scripts.build:back: cd backend && wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-name index
scripts.build:front: esbuild frontend/index.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --format=esm --loader:.wasm=dataurl --external:react && cp frontend/editor.html dist/ && node tools/build-rooms.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:back && npm run build:front
scripts.dev:back: cd backend && cargo watch -i pkg -s 'wasm-pack build --profiling --target web --out-name index'
